name: PT Gema Grahasarana Tbk
summary: PT Gema Grahasarana Tbk operates as an interior contractor and furniture manufacturer in Indonesia and internationally. It offers a range of products and services, such as interior fit-outs, furniture and panel manufacturing, mechanical and electrical installation, maintenance, and logistics. The company also manufactures and sells customized, modular, home and office, and hospitality furniture. In addition, the company is involved in trading laminated material interior and furniture; house, and office furniture and equipment; and interior and furniture components. It serves banking and financial institutions; oil, gas, and mining, as well as retail and hospitality industries; and multinational company and others. The company was founded in 1984 and is headquartered in West Jakarta, Indonesia. PT Gema Grahasarana Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Virucci Indogriya Sarana.
